DESCRIPTION: This is displayed in the tooltip. Spaces should not be used be avoided in NAMES, with the exception of multi-word keywords (see next entry).
Make sure the first element in NAMES has no underscores. The rest should use _ in the place of spaces. In card text, you'll use the underscore versions.
Cursed energy lags behind a physical strike, creating a second impact at the start of the enemy's next turn.
A spatial distortion that occurs when cursed energy is applied within 0.000001 seconds of a physical hit. Massive damage increase.

Sukuna's innate technique. Slashes like Dismantle, Cleave, and Spiderweb prepare the target for the Divine Flame.
